title: fimbristylis cinnamomea
intro: Fimbristylis cinnamomea, also known as Golden Sambo, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Fimbristylis cinnamomea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body from infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and infusions, to treat various health conditions.
